message:
🐛 Fix terminal-writer tests: add rAF polyfill for jsdom (#166)

Tests were failing with 'requestAnimationFrame is not defined' because
jsdom doesn't provide rAF. Added a synchronous rAF/cAF polyfill that
allows tests to explicitly flush pending callbacks via flushRAF().

All 45 tests now pass when run with the correct config.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
